zh.lifeSummary: 當William d'Oyley於1370年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Thomas d'Oyley49歲，母親Alice Atlude30歲。他和Isabella Moore至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1424年2月4日在英國巴金哈姆爾哈布萊登享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: d'Oyley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Olley with fused Old French preposition d' ‘from’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

variants.name: Dilley
meanings: English: possibly a pet form of an unrecorded Old English personal name Dylla, found as the first element in the placenames Dillington (in the former Huntingdonshire) and Dilton (in Wiltshire). The name may sometimes have been confused with Doyley and Dolley (see Olley ).
German: variant of   Dilly   or a surname of French origin, an altered form of   Delay  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Dilly  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William d'Oyley was born in 1370, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas d'Oyley, was 49 and his mother, Alice Atlude, was 30. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Isabella Moore. He died on 4 February 1424, in Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 54.

ko.lifeSummary: William d'Oyley(이)가 1370년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas d'Oyley(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Atlude(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Isabella Moore(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1424년 2월 4일 영국 벅잉함실르 햄블레든에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Isabella Moore. Он умер 4 февраля 1424 г. в местности хамбледен, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.
